comment_mem_type_spi_nand: refer to extend memory type. 0x00: spi nand
comment_mem_type_sd: refer to extend memory type.  0x10: sd
comment_mem_type_emmc: refer to extend memory type. 0x20: emmc
comment_mem_type_ufs: refer to extend memory type. 0x30: ufs
norflash_dld_comment: NOR Flash下载配置项数组，默认为空数组。每个元素包含：addr(地址), magic(魔法值), dual-chip(双芯片模式), file(文件路径)
extend_memory_dld_comment: 扩展内存下载配置项数组,拓展内存类型见 mem_type 配置(必需配置项）。地址为管理的物理地址。每个元素包含：addr(地址), file(文件路径)
extend_fs_dld_comment: 扩展内存文件系统下载项配置 mem_type 配置(必需配置项）。每个元素包含：file(文件路径)， fs_path(文件系统路径)
